stories.title: How did Delmon Young turn into 71 WAR and counting...
stories.summary: With the 2026 trade deadline looming, let's delve into some of MLB's most prominent trade trees.

stories.title: FIFA to investigate players clash after WC final
stories.summary: FIFA has opened a disciplinary investigation into the ugly scenes that marred the end of Sunday's World Cup final involving several Argentina players and coaches physically attacking members of the Spain team.

stories.title: Michigan AD Manuel to step down at end of year
stories.summary: Warde Manuel will step down as Michigan AD at the end of the calendar year, the school announced as part of the conclusion of an investigation into the culture of athletics at the university.

stories.title: Sources: Thybulle, Lakers agree to 1-year deal
stories.summary: Free agent forward Matisse Thybulle has agreed on a one-year, $3.3 million deal to sign with the Los Angeles Lakers, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: LIV sued by tech company over unpaid invoices
stories.summary: LIV Golf is being sued for over $1 million by Mobii Systems Group Ltd., a Canadian-based technology company that supplied the circuit's "Any Shot, Any Time" broadcast features.
